name: Lootable Container
description: Interaction-based lootable container with random loot generation from configurable loot tables, visual open/closed states, and optional respawn timer. Works with the interaction system for raycast-based activation.

slots.name: parent
slots.description: Parent node path for the LootableContainer

slots.name: loot_table_path
slots.description: Path to the loot table JSON defining possible drops

slots.name: respawn_time
slots.description: Seconds until container refills (0 to never respawn)

slots.name: interaction_prompt
slots.description: Prompt text shown when player looks at the container

slots.name: open_animation_duration
slots.description: Duration of the open/close animation in seconds
